_comment: Template for `npm run map:videos`. Copy to video-map.json (gitignored) and fill in REAL sources, then run `npm run map:videos -- --dry-run` to preview and `npm run map:videos` to apply. Keys are topic slugs from src/data/topics.json. A value is a YouTube id/URL string, a remote .mp4 URL string, a local /videos/<slug>.mp4 path, or a { provider, source, poster?, captions? } object. Keys starting with _ (like this one) are ignored, so you can leave this comment in place.
_youtube_string: ten-types-of-pets is mapped from a bare 11-char YouTube id (a full youtube.com / youtu.be URL also works)
_remote_mp4_object: ten-types-of-drinks is a remote MP4 with a poster frame and caption tracks
_local_mp4_object: ten-types-of-farm-animals maps a locally generated MP4. It is applied ONLY if public/videos/ten-types-of-farm-animals.mp4 exists; otherwise it is warned about and skipped (never written as a broken path). Use --dry-run to check before applying.
